description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages (test and deploy). Add a sast job that runs in the default test stage using the docker:stable image with a docker:stable-dind service, sets DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay2, executes `export SP_VERSION=$(echo "$CI_SERVER_VERSION" | sed 's/^\([0-9]*\)\.\([0-9]*\).*/\1-\2-stable/')` then runs `docker run --env SAST_CONFIDENCE_LEVEL="${SAST_CONFIDENCE_LEVEL:-3}" --volume "$PWD:/code" --volume /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock "registry.gitlab.com/gitlab-org/security-products/sast:$SP_VERSION" /app/bin/run /code`, and always uploads the SAST report gl-sast-report.json as a sast artifact while allowing failures. Add a pages job in the deploy stage that runs `mkdir .public`, `cp -r * .public`, and `mv .public public`, publishes the public/ directory as a pages artifact, and is limited to the master branch.
